channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A safe space for girls who've faced sexual violence
item.description: The Democratic Republic of Congo is seeing a significant increase in acts of sexual violence against girls and young women. A support center offers a ...

item.title: This behavior can be a turning point for families caring for a dementia patient
item.description: Wandering, and "elopement," are frightening and dangerous behaviors by people with dementia. For some families, it is the point when they begin to see...

item.title: Should You Take Methylated B Vitamins? Here’s What You Need To Know
item.description: You don't want to miss out on these brain benefits.

item.title: A High-Protein Stuffed Sweet Potato That’s Seriously Satisfying
item.description: Serve it with this zesty slaw.

item.title: A 21-Year Study On 100K+ Women Finds This Diet Reduces Stroke Risk
item.description: New research adds to growing evidence that what you eat matters for brain health—especially for women.

item.title: Primary care is in trouble. Doctors are banding together to increase market power
item.description: As costs increase, primary care practices are joining forces in Independent Physician Associations. The goal is to leverage better insurance contracts...

item.title: Is that carb ultra-processed? Here's a test even a kid can do
item.description: The latest nutrition guidelines urge Americans to avoid highly processed food. But when it comes to carbs, many people don't know which ones are ultra...

item.title: The Science-Backed Morning Habit You're Missing — It Takes Only 5 Minutes
item.description: Plus, it's quick, free, and incredibly effective.

item.title: 7 Science-Backed Ways to Lower Your Blood Pressure Naturally
item.description: No 2. on the list is crucial.

item.title: Photos: The flying doctors of Lesotho won't let their wings be clipped
